name: hermes-skills
description: A curated collection of 80 skills across 20 plugin domains for Claude Code and other AI coding agents.

plugins.name: apple-skills
plugins.description: Manage Apple services: Notes, Reminders, FindMy, iMessage.

plugins.name: ai-agent-skills
plugins.description: Delegate coding tasks to Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Hermes Agent.

plugins.name: creative-skills
plugins.description: SVG diagrams, ASCII art, hand-drawn diagrams, animations, web designs, music.

plugins.name: data-science-skills
plugins.description: Interactive Python execution with stateful Jupyter kernel.

plugins.name: devops-skills
plugins.description: Webhook subscriptions for event-driven agent activation.

plugins.name: qa-testing-skills
plugins.description: Systematic exploratory QA testing of web applications.

plugins.name: email-skills
plugins.description: Terminal email management via IMAP/SMTP with himalaya.

plugins.name: gaming-skills
plugins.description: Set up modded Minecraft servers and play Pokemon autonomously.

plugins.name: github-skills
plugins.description: Full GitHub workflow: auth, repo management, PR review, issues.

plugins.name: leisure-skills
plugins.description: Find nearby places using OpenStreetMap.

plugins.name: mcp-skills
plugins.description: Model Context Protocol: manage and connect external MCP servers.

plugins.name: media-skills
plugins.description: GIF search, music generation, audio visualization, YouTube transcripts.

plugins.name: mlops-skills
plugins.description: ML lifecycle: training, inference, evaluation, cloud GPU, image/audio models.

plugins.name: note-taking-skills
plugins.description: Read, search, and create notes in the Obsidian vault.

plugins.name: productivity-skills
plugins.description: Google Workspace, Linear, Notion, Feishu, PDF editing, OCR, PowerPoint.

plugins.name: red-teaming-skills
plugins.description: Jailbreak and red-team API-served LLMs using G0DM0D3 techniques.

plugins.name: research-skills
plugins.description: Search arXiv papers, monitor blogs/RSS, manage knowledge bases, markets.

plugins.name: smart-home-skills
plugins.description: Control Philips Hue lights, rooms, and scenes.

plugins.name: social-media-skills
plugins.description: Interact with X/Twitter from the terminal.

plugins.name: dev-workflow-skills
plugins.description: TDD, systematic debugging, code review, planning, subagent-driven dev.
